title: DisableJoinMessage
description: Silence default join and quit messages for a cleaner chat. [1.8 - 26.1+] Spigot/Paper/Purpur/Folia
body:
# 🔇 DisableJoinMessage ### **Clean. Silent. Effortless.** ![Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/Version-1.1-blue?style=for-the-badge) ![Minecraft](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-1.8--26.1+-gold?style=for-the-badge) ![Folia](https://img.shields.io/badge/Folia-Native_Support-brightgreen?style=for-the-badge) ---
## ✨ **What is DisableJoinMessage?** **DisableJoinMessage** is the simplest and most lightweight solution to remove the default "Player joined the game" and "Player left the game" messages from your server. No configuration, no commands, just drop the JAR and enjoy a cleaner chat. --- ## 🚀 **Key Features** * 🧹 **Total Silence:** Automatically hides all default join and quit messages. * ⚡ **Ultra Lightweight:** Zero performance impact. Perfect for high-population servers. * 🍃 **Drop-and-Play:** Works out of the box. No configuration files required. * ⚡ **Folia Native Support:** Fully compatible with region-threaded servers like Folia. * 🤝 **High Compatibility:** Uses `LOWEST` event priority, allowing other custom message plugins to function correctly if needed. --- ## ⚙️ **Technical Details** * **Version Support:** 1.8.x up to the latest 1.21+ / 26.1+ versions. * **Platform Support:** Spigot, Paper, Purpur, Pufferfish, and Folia. ---
**Keep your chat clean and professional.** **The minimalist choice for modern servers.**
